intended_use: aPROMISE is intended to be used by healthcare professionals and researchers for acceptance, transfer, storage, image display, manipulation, quantification and reporting of digital medical images. The
intended_use_full: aPROMISE is intended to be used by healthcare professionals and researchers for acceptance, transfer, storage, image display, manipulation, quantification and reporting of digital medical images. The system is intended to be used with images acquired using nuclear medicine (NM) imaging using PSMA PET/CT. The device provides general Picture Archiving and Communications System (PACS) tools as well as a clinical application for oncology including marking of regions of interest and quantitative analysis.
target_condition: Suspected metastatic disease in prostate cancer patients
ground_truth: NEMA phantom with known reference values; clinician manual measurements
other_metrics: aPROMISE demonstrated high sensitivity in pre-selection of regions of interest determined to be suspicious for metastatic disease; automated quantification of tracer uptake in reference organs showed more reproducibility and consistency than manual clinician measurements
